zh.Yealand Redmayne, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾也阿藍德 雷德梅尼
zh.Lonsdale, West Riding, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew Redman於1250年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Henry Redman II20歲，母親Joan Camberton10歲。他於大約1290年與Goditha de Camberton在英國越可爾卡梅頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1294年登記服兵役。他去世於1318年在英國英格蘭享年68歲。

zh-hans.Yealand Redmayne, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾也阿藍德 雷德梅尼
zh-hans.Lonsdale, West Riding, Yorkshire, Englan: 英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthew Redman于1250年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，他的父亲Henry Redman II20岁，母亲Joan Camberton10岁。他于大约1290年与Goditha de Camberton在英国越可爾卡梅頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1294年登记服兵役。他去世于1318年在英国英格兰享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Redman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English red (Old English hrēod) ‘reed’ + -man, presumably for a thatcher or reed-cutter. Compare Reeder .
English: in southeastern England sometimes a topographic name perhaps for someone who lived by a clearing, from Middle English rede (Old English rēod, rȳd) ‘clearing’ + man.
English: habitational name from Redmain (Cumberland), from Old English rēad ‘red’ + an uncertain second element, perhaps a dialect form of man ‘cairn’.

variants.name: Reeder
meanings: English: occupational name for someone who used reeds as a roofing material (a thatcher), a derivative of Middle English rede ‘reed’ + -er. Compare Reed and Redman .

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a clearing, a derivative of Middle English rede, ride, rude ‘clearing’ (see Reed ) + -er, synonymous and interchangeable with atte Rede, atte Rude ‘at the clearing’. This type of name, composed of a topographic term + -er, is common in Kent, Surrey and Sussex, and it is also found in Essex.
Dutch and German: variant of   Reder   3.

variants.name: Redhead
meanings: nickname for someone with red hair, from Middle English red ‘red’ + he(ve)d ‘head’. Compare Redman .
habitational name from an unidentified place in northern England called Redhead, probably meaning ‘red headland’.

variants.name: Rodman
meanings: English: occupational name for a thatcher or reed-cutter, from Southwest Middle English rod(e), rud(e) (Old English hrēod) ‘reed’ + -man. Synonymous with Redman 1.
English: topographic name for someone who lived at a clearing, from Middle English rode (Old English rodu) or Southwest Middle English rude (Old English rȳde) ‘clearing’ + man. See Redman 2.
Americanized form of German Rodmann: variant of Rodemann (see Rodeman ).

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew Redman was born in 1250, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Redman II, was 20 and his mother, Joan Camberton, was 10. He married Goditha de Camberton about 1290, in Camerton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He registered for military service in 1294. He died in 1318, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthew Redman est né en 1250, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Redman II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Camberton, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Goditha de Camberton environ 1290, à Camerton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1294. Il est décédé en 1318, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthew Redman 1250 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Redman II 20 und seine Mutter Joan Camberton 10. Er hat um 1290 in Camerton, Yorkshire, England Goditha de Camberton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1294 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1318 im Alter von 68 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew Redman è nato il nel 1250 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Redman II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan Camberton, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Goditha de Camberton circa 1290, nel Camerton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1294. Morì nel 1318, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew Redmanが1250年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Henry Redman IIは20歳，母Joan Cambertonは10歳であった。約1290年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカムルトンでGoditha de Cambertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1294年に兵役登録をした。彼は1318年にイギリスイギリスで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew Redman(이)가 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Redman II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Camberton(은)는 10세였다. 그는 대략 1290년 영국 요르크실르 캐머턴에서 Goditha de Camberton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1294년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew Redman nasceu em 1250, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Redman II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Camberton, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Goditha de Camberton aproximadamente 1290, em Camerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1294. Ele faleceu em 1318, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew Redman родился в 1250 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Redman II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Camberton, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Goditha de Camberton около 1290 г. в местности камиртон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1294 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1318 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matthew Redman nació en 1250, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Redman II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Camberton, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Goditha de Camberton aproximadamente 1290, en Camerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1294. Murió en 1318, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
